subcodes.first_line: The Book of God hath been sent down in truth, yet the people comprehend not. The Promise hath come to pass, and the Promised One calleth aloud before all faces [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب الله نزل بالحق و القوم لا یفقهون قد اتی الوعد و الموعود ینادی امام الوجوه
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution
